_note: PROTECTED network ao:LABINOV_BORIS. protected_network_hold=true PRESERVED regardless of evidence strength, until explicitly released.

result.structure_evidence: D2 Dental at Oak Street P.C. is a single friendly-PC shell used as the licensed entity across 7+ IL addresses. NPI 1821301102 (D2 Dental of Illinois, P.C.) lists DBA 'Destiny Dental' and mailing address 137 N Oak Park Ave, Suite 200, Oak Park, IL — corporate HQ of L2 Management, the DSO that manages Destiny Dental. Boris Labinov is CFO of L2 Management (non-dentist), co-founder of Destiny Dental with Jim Lucci. D2 Dental of Michigan and Ohio also use 137 N Oak Park Ave. Avesis lists 'D2 Dental of Illinois' and 'D2 Dental of Lansing' as Destiny Dental network providers. Textbook friendly-PC/MSO: single P.C. name across all IL offices + non-dentist CFO as AO + management company (L2 Management) at shared Oak Park HQ.
result.pe_evidence: Dixon Midland Company (Chicago PE) co-founded/funded Destiny Dental in 2010. Destiny Dental acquired by ProSmile Holdings LLC on September 4, 2024. ProSmile backed by TriSpan (PE, NY/London). Sources: ProSmile press release, Livingstone Partners tombstone, TriSpan press release, Private Equity Info profile.

result.reasoning: D2 Dental at Oak Street P.C. is the IL friendly-PC shell for Destiny Dental, a DSO managed by L2 Management (HQ 137 N Oak Park Ave). Confirmed by OpenNPI DBA 'Destiny Dental' on NPI 1821301102 and shared corporate mailing across D2 entities in IL/MI/OH. Boris Labinov is CFO of L2 Management (non-dentist), AO across all 7 P.C. locations = MSO agent structure. PE doubly documented: Dixon Midland (2010 founding) and ProSmile/TriSpan (Sept 2024 acquisition). 3 of 7 members NPI-confirmed; all 7 confirmed via shared P.C. + AO + corporate mailing.
